duration_policy: CLI-supported integer duration; multimodal2video package uses duration=4 for seedance2.0_vip
ratio_policy: multimodal2video uses explicit 16:9 ratio per current planning contract
final_edit_target: 0.6s-1.2s if a high-impact section exists after generation

references.duty: Fenshou identity only. Black/red armored male warrior, face, hair, armor, silhouette, body type, aggressive forward pressure.

Highest-priority Shuangji identity protection only. Female face, female identity, silver-blue high ponytail, blue-silver armor collar/shoulders, white-blue robe panels, calm sharp expression. Do not use as action/rhythm/scene/camera reference.
Rainy ancient temple courtyard, frontal main-hall axis, wet stone floor, cinematic environment only. Do not use as character identity reference.

reference_exclusion_policy.excluded_reason: V012 is useful as text failure guidance only; do not use V012 or earlier video frames as visual references because they may reinforce held-contact choreography, soft impact, or identity drift.

failure_modes_addressed: V011 Shuangji male-coded identity drift despite correct refs
V012 identity improved but action too slow and impact too soft
V012 1.5x cut still diagnostic only, not enough contact density
visual_goal: identity-protected faster close-range follow-up combat after the SHOT-02 shockwave beat
action_concept: true-speed collision-based close combat with at least 2x V012 speed feel, five contact beats in the first 1.0s, and continued fighting through the final second
rhythm_strategy: at least 2x faster feel than V012 original
five quick contact beats within the first 1.0s
contact -> immediate rebound -> re-entry -> deflect -> counter -> re-entry
timing_design: 0.0s-0.20s Fenshou explodes forward from wet stone; front foot skids hard; shoulder and hip drive first short forearm/wrist collision.
0.20s-0.40s Shuangji snaps contact aside with sharp wrist slap; both arms rebound immediately; sleeve and high ponytail whip sideways.
0.40s-0.60s Fenshou re-enters with compact shoulder/forearm bump, not a hold; Shuangji absorbs and redirects with tight forearm parry.
0.60s-0.80s Shuangji answers with short palm or elbow-line interruption; Fenshou upper body recoils slightly from contact.
0.80s-1.00s Fenshou cuts back in with another short strike or wrist trap; Shuangji steps diagonally and deflects again.
1.00s-3.00s continue into a second chain of fast close-range attacks and defenses; do not settle into a guard pose.
3.00s-4.00s continue fighting through the tail with another attack/defense setup; do not pose out, freeze, or slow down.
force_impact_strategy: contact pushes rain droplets and sleeves outward
robe snap, sleeve snap, hair whip
each contact lasts only a fraction of a second
every contact causes immediate physical response
power comes from body mechanics and collision, not slow motion
camera_strategy: frontal rainy temple axis remains readable
camera may subtly follow combat direction and micro-adjust with the exchange
do not overuse camera cuts yet
do not zoom into a beauty portrait
do not turn into a still character poster
negative_constraints: no masculine jaw / heavy male brow / broad male torso for Shuangji
prompt_summary: Chinese prompt with explicit @ reference-duty mapping, exactly two characters, highest-priority Shuangji identity lock, at least 2x V012 speed feel, five quick contact beats in the first 1.0s, collision/recoil/foot-skid/splash/sleeve-snap mechanics, subtle combat-follow camera, and strict negative constraints.
allowed_next_action: Human package review, then explicit user authorization required for exactly one future canary/preflight/live submit. Do not submit from this package step.
